title: Solesteam's Generic ??? Mod
description:
A happy goofy whimsical mod that adds a couple of mobs, who's goofy, happy, and whimsical! Nothing to fear, no body lurking in your world... Just... Watch your back... and keep on the move...

And I don't recommend setting your spawn...
body:
Dagnabit, according to content rules I gotta explain what this mod really does...



***If you don't wanna spoil it, just ignore this!***


** **


**  **

Well here we go, first off, it's not happy or whimsical at all, it's a horror mod, made in imitation of the dweller mods that have gained popularity as of late...


*Here's what it adds:*

A single (well on a technical basis 4 for it's jump-scare counterpart and trigger entity) mob, a hostile one of which appears when a strange being catches you.

*Why you'd wanna download it:*

If you like the creepy or terrifying, here you go.

*Other important info:*

It breaks and places blocks and can track you down from 2048 blocks away.
